$metadata.description: Design tokens extracted from Figma for direct MCP referencing. Each token includes $extensions.figma.key for Figma variable lookup without re-scanning.

spacing.$description: Spacing scale tokens. All alias to Spacing/* literal variables.

borderRadius.$description: Border radius tokens with literal values.

width.$description: Width constraint tokens. All alias to Spacing/* literal variables.

container.$description: Container layout tokens with mode-based values.

typography.$description: Typography tokens including font sizes, line heights, weights, and families.

color.$description: Semantic color tokens with Light (default) and Dark mode values. All values reference primitive palette aliases.

bg-primary_alt.$description: Primary background alt (aliases bg-secondary in dark)

bg-secondary_alt.$description: Secondary background alt (aliases bg-primary in dark)

bg-primary-solid.$description: Primary solid background (dark surface in light mode)

alpha.$description: Alpha/opacity color tokens. Black alphas invert to white in dark mode and vice versa.

alpha-white-100.$description: 100% white (aliases Gray dark mode/950 in dark)

toggle-slim-border_pressed-hover.$description: Toggle slim border pressed hover state

utility.$description: Per-color-family utility tokens (50-900 scale). Light mode maps directly to palette; dark mode inverts the scale (50<->950, 100<->900, 200<->800, 300<->700, 400<->600, 500<->500). Brand_alt maps to Gray in dark mode.

brand_alt.$description: Brand alt utility colors (maps to Gray in dark mode)
